accepted_comments: Reevaluate and repair PR #2 against current main. Reconcile diverged history without force rewriting; preserve exact provenance; canonicalize review authority to Jacob Elias Redmond while retaining legacy aliases; quarantine or separately migrate Socrates; regenerate compatibility manifest and all bound digests; run exact-head conformance and adversarial regression tests; resolve stale or contradictory review findings; document migration effects and rollback; then route the verified draft through Fiona Celeste Arden and Michael Aaron Redmond before final human approval.
